name: TestWaitForInput
title: TestWaitForInput
syntax: long TestWaitForInput(long handle, dword timeout); // form 2
long TestWaitForInput(long handle, dword timeout, dword defaultIndex); // form 3
description: After you have created a value table or range dialog use this function to open the dialog.

parameters.name: DefaultIndex
parameters.description: The index of the value is marked on dialog opening.

parameters.name: Timeout
parameters.description: Optional timeout for the dialog in ms.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
